life.title: Life Patterns
life.buildingBaselineSub: Insights appear once you've got about 4 weeks of activity logged across the suite.
life.patternsEmpty: Nothing crosses the noise floor this week. Keep logging — strong patterns become more obvious over time.
life.footer: Insights derived from your logged activity — never causal claims.

onboarding.welcomeTitle: Let's set up your life OS
onboarding.welcomeBody: Nexus pulls your finances, fitness, studies, work and habits into one score — so you can see how your life is trending at a glance.
onboarding.profileBody: This sets which domains shape your Life Score. You can fine-tune the mix anytime in Settings.
onboarding.profileCustomHint: Prefer a custom mix? Set it later in Settings → Life Profile.
onboarding.domainsBody: These domains will feed your Life Score. Greyed-out ones are off in this profile.
onboarding.goalBody: Goals give your Life Score something to track against — a net-worth target, a workout count, a GPA. Optional; you can add them anytime.
onboarding.languageBody: You can change this anytime in Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.guestBlurb: You're using NCC without an account. Local data stays on this device, but won't sync across devices and won't survive uninstall. Sign in to enable Supabase sync and cross-app SSO with LimeLog + StudyDesk.
settings.encryptionSub: Device-encrypted at rest (Android FBE) · TLS 1.3 in transit
settings.forceResyncConfirm: Re-queue ALL local data for upload to your cloud account? Useful if sync got stuck.
settings.lifeProfileBlurb: Which domains shape your Life Score and how they're weighted.
settings.notifPluginUnavail: Notifications plugin unavailable. Toggles still record your choice, but actual notifications need a working native build + OS-level permission to fire.
settings.notifMasterOffSub: All notifications off — turn on to enable categories below
settings.weeklyReviewSub: Sunday 18:00 · summary of finance, study, fitness, tasks
settings.taskRemindersSub: Heads-up when a task is due
settings.budgetAlertsSub: When a category nears or exceeds its monthly cap
settings.portfolioEodSub: Recap of today's move on US market close
settings.marketNewsSub: Stories about tickers you own + major market moves
settings.macroHeadlinesSub: Fed, CPI, jobs, FOMC, inflation, recession
settings.permMasterTail: If notifications already work at the OS level you can ignore this.
settings.permWeeklyTail: Toggle is on but reminder won’t fire until permission is granted.
settings.permToggleTail: Toggle is on but notifications may not fire until permission is granted in Android Settings.
settings.finnhubHelp: Get a free key at finnhub.io · 60 calls/min per key
settings.noFinnhubKey: No Finnhub key configured — US stock fundamentals, news and earnings will fall back to Yahoo. Add a key for richer data.
settings.twoSlots: Two slots round-robin per call — doubles your 60/min headroom.
settings.clearKeyConfirm: Remove this API key? You'll need to paste it again to use Finnhub.
settings.apiUsageResets: Resets at local midnight. Cached responses don't count against the budget.
settings.clearAllConfirm: Wipe ALL local data? This cannot be undone.
settings.pinReentry: Re-enter your 6-digit PIN to confirm wipe:
settings.wipeLocked: Too many wrong attempts — locked for {{n}}s. Wipe cancelled.
settings.pwResetSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.
settings.signOutBlurb: Choose what happens to data already saved on this device. Cloud data is untouched either way.
settings.keepLocalSub: Faster next sign-in. Choose this on your own phone.
settings.wipeLocalSub: Recommended on shared or borrowed devices.

dash.buildHabitBody: One small daily action — start with one.
dash.baselineBody: Cross-domain insights surface after about 4 weeks of data. Keep logging — patterns will appear here when there's enough to see.
dash.quietBody: No standout patterns this week. Tap for your weekly life score breakdown.

habits.noHabitsBody: Start with one small daily action.
habits.nothingToday: Nothing scheduled today. Tomorrow's habits will surface here.

tasks.noTasks: No tasks here. Tap + New to add one.

addhabit.title: Title
addhabit.dayCountsWhen: A day counts as done when you hit the amount.
addhabit.streakGrace: Streak grace still applies — one missed scheduled day per 7 days won't break the streak.
addhabit.reminderAt: You'll get a notification at {{time}} on eligible days.

goals.title: Goals
goals.noGoalsTitle: No goals yet. Tap + Goal to set one.
goals.noGoalsBody: Goals are derived from data you already track — net worth, tasks, workouts, study hours, lifts, GPA.
goals.exerciseHint: Matches case-insensitively against the "exercise" field on your workout sets.
goals.startHint: Only events on/after this date count.

lock.pinsNoMatch: PINs do not match — try again
lock.tooManyError: Too many wrong PINs — locked for {{secs}}s.
lock.tooManyPrefix: Too many wrong PINs — locked for
lock.setPinFirst: Set a PIN first — biometric unlocks AFTER initial setup
lock.forgotPin: Forgot PIN? Reset in Settings → Clear All Data

tx.pickDest: Pick a destination account for the transfer.
tx.srcDestDiffer: Transfer source and destination must differ.
tx.noAccounts2: so this transaction can hit a balance.

budg.title: Budget Categories
budg.linkedOn: Transactions in this category will auto-adjust the linked account balance.
budg.linkedOff: No auto-update. Net worth balances stay manual for this category.
budg.empty: No categories yet — tap + New to add one
budg.deleteConfirm: Delete “{{name}}”? Transactions tagged to it will be untagged.

ov.netWorthEmpty: Tap to add cash, property, loans and more
ov.runScenarioSub: Model a purchase, raise, or savings change
ov.budgetEmpty: No categories — tap Manage to add some
ov.spendEmpty: Log an expense to start filling this in.
ov.holdingsEmpty: No holdings yet — tap to add
ov.watchlistSub: Tickers you're tracking but don't own

nw.runwayEmpty: Add a Savings account above to start building runway. Liquid cash: {{liq}}.
nw.openingNote: Opening was {{amt}} · saving here adjusts the opening figure so the displayed balance matches what you typed.
nw.liabilityHint: Liabilities (credit cards / loans) carry a negative balance — enter what you OWE as a negative number for new accounts.
nw.assetHint: Account balance updates automatically when you log transactions against this account.
nw.empty: No manual assets yet. Add cash savings, property, loans, or anything outside your stock portfolio.

ad.notFound: Account not found — it may have been deleted. Go back to Net Worth.
ad.unconvertable_one: {{count}} transaction couldn't be FX-converted to {{cur}}; balance may be understated.
ad.unconvertable_other: {{count}} transactions couldn't be FX-converted to {{cur}}; balance may be understated.
ad.noTx: No transactions yet. Tap + Txn above to log one.

wl.helper: Watchlist items use the same quote pipeline as your holdings. Alerts trigger when the price crosses your target.
wl.empty: No watchlist items yet. Tap + Watch to track a ticker without owning it.

mh.title: Manage Holdings
mh.stockHint: Quotes via Finnhub. Use the exchange ticker.
mh.etfHint: ETFs use stock quotes — same ticker rules. International suffixes (.L, .DE) route to Yahoo.
mh.cryptoHint: Prices via CoinGecko. Use the lowercase coin id (bitcoin, ethereum, solana…).
mh.addLater: Add additional purchases later from the Purchases button.
mh.empty: No holdings yet — tap + New to add one
mh.noOpen: No open positions — all holdings are closed
mh.removeConfirm: Remove {{ticker}} from portfolio? Purchase history will also be deleted.

port.cachedDataHint: Showing cached data. Tap retry to attempt a fresh fetch.
port.partial: Partial — some holdings missing prices or FX ·

ml.costHint: Cost is stored in the currency you paid in. The Portfolio screen converts everything to your base currency at quote time.
ml.unitsAvailable: {{units}} units available · cost basis is FIFO (oldest lots first)
ml.noPurchases: No purchases yet — tap + Purchase to record one

ins.techDesc: Composite Buy/Hold/Sell signals from RSI, SMA cross, price momentum, volume pressure, and headline sentiment. Heuristic — not investment advice. Refreshed once per calendar day.
ins.fundDesc: Composite Buy/Hold/Sell signals from P/E vs sector, P/B, P/S, PEG, debt/equity, revenue growth, earnings surprises, and analyst consensus. Heuristic — not investment advice. Refreshed once per week.
ins.emptyUniverse: No holdings or watchlist tickers yet. Add some from Portfolio or Watchlist to see ratings here.

wi.title: What If?
wi.assume1: Returns are nominal (before inflation). 7% nominal ≈ 4.5% real at 2.5% inflation.
wi.assume2: Markets don't return smoothly. A 7% average is wild year-to-year.
wi.assume3: Taxes and fund fees aren't modeled. Real-world outcomes are lower.
wi.assume4: Monthly contribution is constant — no raises or career changes.

sg.title: Savings
sg.overAllocated: Over-allocated — your goals + buffer exceed liquid cash by {{amount}}.
sg.noLiquid1: No cash or savings assets logged yet. Add some under
sg.unconvertable_one: {{count}} item couldn't be converted to {{cur}} (FX rate missing).
sg.unconvertable_other: {{count}} items couldn't be converted to {{cur}} (FX rate missing).
sg.noGoalsSub: Tap + Goal to add one. Each goal is a named target with an optional deadline; allocate from your available cash above.
sg.localOnly: Local only — savings goals don't sync across devices in v1.2.
sg.allocatedHint: Stamp the initial allocation if you're tracking money already set aside. You can also leave this at 0 and use the +/- pills on the row to allocate over time.
sg.investHint: Reduces the selected cash asset and frees up that amount from your available pool. Record the actual buy in Portfolio so net worth stays accurate.
sg.goToPortfolio: Go to Portfolio to record the holding
sg.bufferNoTarget: {{a}} reserved · set a target in Edit

lifeProfile.title: Life Profile
lifeProfile.blurb: Choose which life domains shape your Life Score and how much each one counts. The score and the Life tab adapt to your selection.
lifeProfile.footer: A custom profile needs at least {{min}} domains, each at least {{weight}}%. Weights rebalance automatically to total 100%.

weeklyReview.title: Weekly Review
weeklyReview.yearInReviewSub: Rolling 12-month recap with heatmaps + top rankings
weeklyReview.footer: Sunday evenings at 18:00 you get a push reminder to open this. Toggle in Settings → Notifications.

yearReview.title: Year in Review
yearReview.footerRolling: This is a {{word}} 12-month window — step the anchor back month-by-month to see any 12-month slice of your history.
